name: ImgurImage
description: Field-level documentation of the Imgur Image resource.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Seven-character image hash that identifies the image globally.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Display title chosen by the uploader; may be null.

fields.name: type
fields.description: MIME type of the stored asset (image/jpeg, image/png, image/gif, video/mp4).

fields.name: animated
fields.description: True if the asset is animated GIF or MP4.

fields.name: views
fields.description: Total number of views recorded by Imgur.

fields.name: vote
fields.description: Authenticated user's vote: up, down, or null.

fields.name: favorite
fields.description: Whether the authenticated user has favorited the image.

fields.name: nsfw
fields.description: Whether the image is flagged not-safe-for-work.

fields.name: deletehash
fields.description: Anonymous deletion token returned only on upload.

fields.name: link
fields.description: Public CDN URL of the image (https://i.imgur.com/{id}.{ext}).
